overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Horizon Forbidden West showing the protagonist Aloy walking through a lush tropical jungle environment toward a tribal settlement called Sunstone Rock. The scene features dense vegetation, wooden tribal architecture, and misty atmospheric lighting with god rays filtering through the canopy.

scene_state.functional_zone: tropical jungle path approaching tribal settlement

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the dirt path toward the wooden watchtower in the distance, surveying the lush jungle surroundings

entered.detail: tall multi-level tribal watchtower with wooden platforms visible in the distance ahead
tall tropical palm trees scattered throughout the jungle canopy
massive boulders and rock outcrops covered in moss and vegetation
thick patches of green ferns and undergrowth lining the path
worn dirt path winding through the jungle vegetation
tall misty cliff faces and mountain walls in the background

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with Aloy walking along a winding dirt trail through a dense tropical jungle. A wooden tribal watchtower stands visible in the misty distance ahead, while palm trees and large rock formations frame the path. The atmosphere is serene and exploratory, with god rays filtering through the morning mist.

scene_state.functional_zone: settlement outskirts with wooden tribal structures

events.description: on-screen text notification appears: ENTERING SETTLEMENT SUNSTONE ROCK

agents.ego_description: moving off the main dirt path and entering the settlement area, walking through tall grass and vegetation toward the wooden structures

entered.detail: wooden defensive walls and barriers marking the settlement boundary
cluster of large-leafed tropical plants resembling banana trees
distinctive red-colored foliage patches mixed with green vegetation

segments.scene_description: As Aloy enters the Sunstone Rock settlement, the environment shifts from the open jungle path to the settlement outskirts. The ground becomes grassy and overgrown, with wooden tribal walls and banana plants appearing on the right. The watchtower looms closer ahead while the dirt trail fades behind.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense settlement garden near watchtower with NPC activity

events.description: UI prompt appears indicating an item can be picked up from the ground

agents.ego_description: navigating through dense ferns and vegetation near the watchtower, approaching wooden structures where settlers are visible

notable_agents.action: settler standing near the wooden building, observing the surroundings

entered.detail: wooden railing and fence structures surrounding the watchtower base
elevated wooden walkways and platforms attached to the settlement buildings

segments.scene_description: In the final segment, Aloy moves through dense ferns approaching the wooden watchtower from the side. The camera turns slightly left as she navigates the thick vegetation. A settler NPC stands visible near a wooden building on the right, and the UI indicates an item can be collected from the ground. The watchtower now dominates the left side of the frame as the scene ends.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a misty tropical jungle path into the outskirts of a tribal settlement. It begins with Aloy walking along a winding dirt trail framed by palm trees and rock formations, with a distant wooden watchtower visible through filtering god rays. As she advances, the environment shifts from the open jungle to the settlement's edge, where the dirt path gives way to overgrown grass and wooden tribal walls lined with banana plants. The scene then moves through dense ferns as the camera turns slightly left, bringing the towering watchtower into dominant view on the left side of the frame. Finally, the movement passes a settler standing near a wooden building as an interactable item appears on the ground.
